content.en:
"Such bones are of high value, put them away!"

Ye Tian swallowed this piece of bone into the space in his abdomen and stored it.

Then, he began to look for other bone fragments, and time passed slowly, and one after another bone fragments were put away by Ye Tian.

These bone fragments alone, if they are taken out and sold in the future, can be exchanged for a lot of precious resources, and even the half-step Eternal Realm can look at these bones.

The only thing that made Ye Tian a little regretful was that the Eternal Realm power contained in these bones was too thin, and it was not as good as the Eternal Realm finger in Ye Tian's hand.

Of course, it was mainly because the power of this arm was used to hatch the Black Mist Worm, and a single arm could hatch this almost endless Black Mist Worm, which made a large number of half-step Eternal Realms extremely fearful.

From this, it can be seen that the owner of that Eternal Realm finger is far inferior to the owner of this arm.

After a long time, Ye Tian collected all the bones of this arm.

Abrupt.

The repulsive force came, and the Black Mist River began to repel countless Black Mist Worms.

Although Ye Tian's strength was strong, he couldn't resist the rejection of the Black Mist River.

No, strictly speaking, it is not the rejection of the Black Fog River, but the rejection of the special space where the Black Fog River is located.

From this, it can be seen that the primordial sea is very special, otherwise it would not be possible to make the arm of the Eternal Tribulation power turn into the state of the Black Mist River.

Ye Tian's strength and realm were far from being able to peek into the true secrets of the Primordial Sea.

After being ostracized, the Black Mist River vanished.

And the number of black fog insects has increased a lot, and they are scattered, and the concentration of black fog around them will also be thinned.

As the years passed, the primordial sea did not change much.

In the Void Source Palace, Ye Tian used the resources of the Primordial Sea to cultivate to the peak realm of the Sixfold Supreme One, preparing to impact the Sevenfold Supreme realm.

He took out a treasure, the Eternal Violet Heart Flower!

This treasure could easily help him break through from the Sixfold Supreme Realm to the Sevenfold Supreme Realm.

Once he breaks through, with his Endless Eternal Body of the Consummation Realm, as well as a variety of Eternal Techniques, it is enough to fight with the weaker half-step Eternal Realm.

With the help of the Eternal Realm Finger, it was enough to defeat a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse who was not weak.

Ye Tian swallowed the Eternal Violet Heart Flower and began to refine the Eternal Violet Heart Flower, impacting the Sevenfold Supreme Realm.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully impact the Sevenfold Supreme Realm.

The Sixfold Supreme to the Sevenfold Supreme is also a huge transformation, and the strength has increased greatly.

At this time, Ye Tian could easily defeat his previous self.

After another period of time, there was good news from the Terran side, and the Terran Race had given birth to another Supreme One.

The person who broke through this time is still Ye Tian's relatives, Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue.

Under Ye Tian's hard work, Xiao Yue can also be regarded as a fierce spirit, breaking through to the realm of the supreme, although it is not a powerful supreme, and its combat effectiveness is not very strong, but it is also a real supreme.

At this point, the Terrans suddenly possessed four supreme beings.

Moreover, the number of first-class invincible people of the Terrans has gradually increased, and everything is progressing in a good direction.

On this day, an incident that happened in the original sea made Ye Tian full of doubts and shock.

Primordial Sea.

Ye Tian, as usual, searched for resources in the primordial sea.

After all, the resources of the primordial sea are constantly generated, so some resources are often born.

But suddenly, the void of the primordial sea cracked open two openings, and two hands grabbed in.

One hand is wrapped in scales, not like a humanoid hand, while the other is like a humanoid hand, white and immature, but full of terrifying aura.

I saw that the two hands grabbed a large number of black fog insects, and these black fog insects tried to erode these two hands, but they couldn't shake them at all.

The two hands easily snatched away a lot of these black fog insects in one fell swoop, and grabbed them again and again.

I don't know how long it has been, but a voice has passed.

"Enough, just catch these black fog worms, don't catch too much!"

"Okay, let's catch it next time!"

As soon as the words fell, the hands of the two powerhouses withdrew from the primordial sea, and the void crack healed.

And during the whole process, Ye Tian didn't dare to move the slightest, and even tried his best to wrap himself inside the other black fog insects, so that countless black fog insects could wrap themselves, so that they would not be easy to find.

It wasn't until those two mysterious existences disappeared that Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

"Those two should be in the Eternal Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

From the conversation between the two Eternal Realms, it can be known that they know about the existence of the Black Fog Worm, and they also need the Black Fog Worm, it seems that the Black Fog Worm is kept here in captivity, and they come to harvest a batch from time to time.

And the Black Mist River is constantly hatching new Black Mist Worms, which causes the Black Mist Bugs in the Primordial Sea to never disappear and maintain a stable number.

"In this way, the primordial sea is actually just a base for the Eternal Realm powerhouse to cultivate the Black Mist Worm, and the half-step Eternal Realm and the treasure land that countless supreme beings crave are actually a base, it's too ironic!"

Until now, Ye Tian had some difficulty imagining that the truth would be like this.

Moreover, does anyone know about the forces in the source sea?

Ye Tian felt that he knew, and even the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion might know, but he wouldn't say it.

Some forces have been born in the Eternal Realm, but the Eternal Realm doesn't stay in the Source Sea for some reason, but the Eternal Realm can definitely appear in the Source Sea.

For example, the time when an innate eternal life is born, the eternal realm appears.

In short, about the secrets of the Eternal Realm, ordinary supreme beings have no way of knowing at all, and Ye Tian doesn't know, and he doesn't even know where to find out.

"When I cultivate to reach the half-step Eternal Realm, maybe there will be a way to know!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Those two mysterious eternal realms would not come to the Primordial Sea again in a short period of time, so Ye Tian would not be worried.

Time passes——————

On this day, another inner enclosure meeting of the Genshen Pavilion began.

The meeting was mainly about sharing intelligence experiences and welcoming a new group of members.

Because of the last time the primordial sea, many members of the inner circle of the Yuanshen Pavilion fell, so another batch was invited.

meeting.

Soon, the welcome ceremony ended, and everyone began to discuss casually.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian asked a question: "Everyone, does anyone know the true use of the Primordial Tree, I only know that the Primordial Tree can produce Primordial Leaves, so is there any other use?"

The True River Sword Ancestor looked at Ye Tian: "Endless Ancestor, could it be that you have found the Primordial Tree?"

"That's not true, but what if I find it later?" Ye Tian said with a smile.

At this time, the True River Sword Ancestor really said the great value of an Primordial Tree.
